findings_summary: Dashboard/API decompose-route guard smoke passed: vFinal parent cards and worker subtasks cannot be fanned out by the generic decomposition route, while ordinary disposable task decompose still works through a fake auxiliary decomposer.
tool_or_profile: Hermes v0.16.0 disposable installed runtime with vFinal adapter patches including candidate 0015
runtime_scope: Disposable installed Hermes checkout and isolated HERMES_HOME/HOME; direct Python calls into dashboard plugin route functions; no production dashboard server.

parent.detail: Overkill Factory cards and worker subtasks cannot be decomposed from dashboard/API; Factory worker graphs must be created through the vFinal method router and explicit operator-saf

worker.detail: Overkill Factory cards and worker subtasks cannot be decomposed from dashboard/API; Factory worker graphs must be created through the vFinal method router and explicit operator-saf

important_limitations: This proves direct dashboard plugin route functions in a disposable installed Hermes runtime after candidate patch 0015.
The positive normal-task path uses a fake auxiliary decomposer to avoid real model calls.
It does not start an authenticated HTTP dashboard server.
It does not prove real auxiliary model quality.
It does not authorize updating a real Hermes runtime.
next_action: Add patch 0015 to the update sequence and continue proving remaining dashboard/API route families.
